name: Uncertainty Calibration
short_description: Confidence reporting, overconfident error analysis, and calibration of agent action probabilities.
detailed_description: Tags assets and tasks that measure or improve the agent's calibration. Covers the overconfident-error-rate metric (Metric 2), confidence-elicitation prompts, and any analysis that relates predicted confidence to action correctness. Use this category for ablations that vary how confidence is requested or scored.
